hero_subtitle: SFTY connects fragmented KYB, UBO, director data and screening outputs into one structured compliance workflow for VASPs to consolidate risk signals and prepare audit-ready evidence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow

problem_description: Compliance teams lack a unified view when KYB, UBO, director and screening data stay siloed across providers. This fragmentation slows risk assessment and weakens the audit trail needed for thorough entity due diligence and case management.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates KYB, UBO, director and screening outputs into one compliance workflow that links risk signals, case context and audit evidence for clearer entity risk management and faster reviews.
workflow_title: From fragmented risk signals to review
workflow_description: SFTY connects KYB, UBO, screening and director risk signals into structured reviews, cases, decisions and audit evidence within one unified compliance workflow.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for digital asset compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer that connects fragmented checks from KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, and screening into connected operational workflows and risk profiles.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY connect fragmented entity risk signals?
faq_2_answer: SFTY consolidates entity data including KYB, UBO, directors and screening results into a structured risk profile, linking associated wallets, transactions and cases for connected entity risk management.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case histories, decision logs and evidence packages to support audit readiness and defensible compliance review within a controlled, traceable workflow environment.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing providers, connecting their outputs into one platform without replacing them, enabling coordinated workflows, rule enforcement and reporting across systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYB or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace underlying KYC, KYB or KYT providers, but orchestrates their outputs into one integrated compliance workflow and decision framework.
final_title: Connect entity risk profiles into one workflow
final_description: Review how SFTY connects KYB, UBO, director and screening outputs into structured cases and audit-ready evidence.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
